# Documentation Index

**Auto-generated on 2026-05-04** — 548 pages across 48 topic clusters.
This index makes Synap documentation searchable and navigable for both humans and AI agents.

- **Public docs** (users): `content/docs/` — product journeys, architecture, integration guides
- **Internal docs** (team): `content/team/` — engineering runbooks, feature specs, platform notes

## Search Tips

- **Find a topic**: Use your browser command-F and search for any keyword
- **Find recent updates**: Pages are sorted by last_updated descending within each group
- **Find team-only docs**: They have a [team] annotation; all others are [users] or unannotated
- **Find by tag**: Search for tags to see which docs share keywords
- **AI agents reference**: When building with Synap, search CLAUDE.md for architecture rules, then use this index to find detailed documentation

---

## Generation

- **Script:** `scripts/generate-index.js`
- **Source:** scans `content/` for all .mdx/.md files with frontmatter
- **Groups:** uses GROUPS config array for topic clustering
- **Re-run:** `node scripts/generate-index.js`
